description:
this guy is cheating in a custom game lmao.
he said he wanted to 2v1 and he said he would pay us if we win nobody is that confident.
he also said he was a champ in ranked 1.0, but in match replay he tried placing a kapkan trap on attic dropdown. lol

I have more clips but uploading them on this website is really buggy.

(match id is in the scoreboard screenshot but ill provide it in text too)
Match ID: 164c135a-3a37-4fd6-b497-6e2f3917b56i

latest_comment.message: look at clips you can clearly see the name or are you saying you cant report someone if their cheating in a custom

description: Him and his friend was rage cheating (crackdaddy3) i couldnt find his user bc he was using a nickname. BAN BOTH AND I NEED MY ELO ROLLBACK

latest_comment.message: Sorry, we don't accept evidence from external platforms. Please upload the clip directly to our website.
No, we flag reported players on https://stats.cc so everyone knows what they're doing. Ubisoft can go to our website to issue manual bans based on the evidence here.
